parsed_output.justification: Justin explicitly claims to have copycatted into a Werewolf and joined Tyler during the night. Tyler also admits to waking up with Justin, although his other claims (being the Robber and having his card in the middle) are contradictory. Paul and Mitchell have both agreed to vote for Justin, and since Justin is admitting to being a Werewolf/Doppelganger-Werewolf, eliminating him is the most likely way for Team Village to win.
